description: Rotates a geometric shape around a center point by a specified angle in degrees, with positive angles rotating counter-clockwise.
utility: Rotate a shape around a center point by a specified angle in degrees

arguments.name: cx, cy
arguments.description: Center of rotation as x, y coordinates (default: origin)

arguments.name: centerPoint
arguments.description: Center of rotation as a point expression (alternative to cx, cy)

alternates.description: Rotate shape around origin (0,0) by angle degrees
Rotate shape around explicit center point (cx, cy)
Rotate shape around a point expression

examples.scenario: Animate rotation of a line segment from 0° to 90° using variable animator
examples.expression: mathexpr_1 = variableanimator(at(1,3), "a", 0, 90); graph_1 = g2d(at(4,19), size(16), range(-5, 5), type(geometry)); line_1 = line(graph_1, point(graph_1, -2.5, -1), point(graph_1, 1.2, 1.4), type(segment)); rotate_1 = rotate(graph_1, line_1, a); playanim_1 = playanimator(mathexpr_1, t(2))

examples.scenario: Full 360° rotation of a line segment from origin
examples.expression: mathexpr_1 = variableanimator(at(1,3), "a", 0, 360); graph_1 = g2d(at(4,19), size(16), range(-6, 6), type(geometry)); line_1 = line(graph_1, point(graph_1, 0, 0), point(graph_1, 3, 0), type(segment), c(blue)); rotate_1 = rotate(graph_1, line_1, a); playanim_1 = playanimator(mathexpr_1, t(3))

examples.scenario: Rotate a line segment by 45 degrees on a plotting graph
examples.expression: graph_1 = g2d(at(4,19), 13.8, 20.3, range(-5, 5), range(-5, 5), type(plotting)); line_1 = line(graph_1, point(graph_1, -2.5, -3.6), point(graph_1, 1.2, -1.4), type(segment)); rotate_1 = rotate(graph_1, line_1, 45)

examples.scenario: Rotate a point P by 60 degrees around the origin on unit circle
examples.expression: G = g2d(at(2,30), size(20), type(geometry)); origin = point(G, 0, 0); P = point(G, 1, 0, c(red)); rot_1 = rotate(G, P, 60, origin)

examples.scenario: Rotate a polygon around a point
examples.expression: graph_1 = g2d(at(4,22), size(13.3), range(-5, 5), type(geometry)); triangle_1 = polygon(graph_1, point(graph_1, -3.4, 1.2), point(graph_1, -3.2, -1.7), point(graph_1, -1.3, -0.9)); point_1 = point(graph_1, 3.3, 2.4); rotate_1 = rotate(graph_1, triangle_1, 45, point_1)
